vocab.meaning: có lợi cho việc học tập/môi trường thuận lợi
vocab.example: The school facilities weren't state-of-the-art, but the atmosphere was highly conducive to learning.

vocab.meaning: sự chăm sóc đời sống tinh thần/tư vấn học đường
vocab.example: I particularly valued the pastoral care at my primary school, as the teachers really looked after our emotional well-being.

vocab.meaning: việc tham gia các hoạt động ngoại khóa
vocab.example: My high levels of extra-curricular involvement in the drama club made my school years incredibly memorable.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thuộc về một nơi nào đó
vocab.example: The small class sizes helped foster a strong sense of belonging among all the students.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/tính chuẩn mực trong học thuật
vocab.example: While I enjoyed the social side, the academic rigor of the curriculum was sometimes quite daunting for a child.

vocab.meaning: những trải nghiệm mang tính hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: My school provided several formative experiences that shaped my interest in environmental science.

vocab.meaning: học vẹt/học thuộc lòng máy móc
vocab.example: I wasn't a fan of the heavy emphasis on rote learning, as it stifled our natural creativity.

vocab.meaning: một môi trường nuôi dưỡng/bao bọc
vocab.example: I was fortunate to grow up in a nurturing environment where teachers encouraged us to voice our opinions.

vocab.meaning: phương pháp sư phạm/cách giảng dạy
vocab.example: The school's innovative pedagogical approach focused more on critical thinking than on standardized testing.
Beyond the subjects I studied, the most valuable thing I took away from school were my lifelong friendships.
